title: Revise one finding three levels down. Only its ancestors re-synthesize. The other 40 branches don't move.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the research tree builds bottom-up · 8 findings → 3 sub-syntheses → root, lit once

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: dim skip pulses · the whole tree memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · a lone self-pulse on the root, no edges, no cost

beats.name: hero-ancestor-path
beats.caption: HERO: revise Finding B2 · only B2 → Synthesis B → Root lights · 7 sibling findings + Synthesis A & C stay DARK

beats.name: different-branch-same-root
beats.caption: revise Finding A1 · a DIFFERENT path lights: A1 → Synthesis A → same Root · B & C stay dark

beats.name: red-fail
beats.caption: Finding C1 source is unparseable · it fails RED · no ancestor wakes, prior answer stands

beats.name: recover
beats.caption: C1 recovers GREEN · its path lights: C1 → Synthesis C → Root

beats.name: converge-two-leaves
beats.caption: revise B1 AND B3 in one drain · Synthesis B woken EXACTLY once · root re-synthesizes once · A & C dark

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · the tree memo-skips · cost back to flat
